utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. In the final coverage plan, all five of these items appear. Each one includes full details and associated costs: health_coverage (physical and mental health insurance with costs), property_coverage (home/contents insurance with costs), travel_coverage (travel insurance with costs), additional_services (enhancement services with costs), and total_budget (complete cost breakdown with monthly and annual totals). Therefore, all items are fully specified with the required details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant's final coverage plan includes several policies all provided by LifeFirst. Each of these corresponds to a LifeFirst Standard Plan or Coverage in the ground‑truth ratings. Specifically: (1) The physical health plan 'Comprehensive physical health...' matches 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' under primary_health_coverage.physical_health, which has rating 9. (2) The mental health plan 'Therapy, psychiatry...' matches 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' under primary_health_coverage.mental_health, which has rating 4. (3) The property coverage 'Home contents...' corresponds to 'LifeFirst Standard Coverage' under property_protection.home_content, which has rating 9. (4) The travel coverage 'Comprehensive international travel...' matches 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' under mobility_coverage.travel_insurance, which has rating 9. (5) The additional professional liability coverage does not have a corresponding entry in the ground‑truth ratings, so there is no rating available for it.
